bulkDataProductBag.productDescriptionText: Contains the concatenated full-text of each patent grant document issued weekly (Tuesdays) from January 1, 1976 to December 25, 2001 (excludes images/drawings). This is the subset of the Patent Grant Full Text Data with Embedded TIFF Images.
bulkDataProductBag.productTitleText: Patent Grant Full-Text Data (No Images) - APS
